title: selaginella deliquescens
intro: Selaginella deliquescens, also known as the "Rainbow Plant", is a species of spore-producing plant in the Selaginellaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Selaginella deliquescens is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in capsule or tincture form.
